item.title: ukulele plus: Come Unto Me - The Chuckwagon Gang - Key of G
item.description: Play along video for the song Come Unto Me from the channel ukulele plus. Artist: The Chuckwagon Gang. Chords: A, A7, C, D, D7, G.

item.title: Ukulele Time Yuji: Scarborough Fair - Simon & Garfunkel - Key of Gm
item.description: Play along video for the song Scarborough Fair from the channel Ukulele Time Yuji. Artist: Simon & Garfunkel. Chords: B♭, B♭maj7, C, F, Gm.

item.title: ukeplayalongs: One Finger Chord Song - Christopher J. Russell
item.description: Play along video for the song One Finger Chord Song from the channel ukeplayalongs. Artist: Christopher J. Russell. Chords: A7, Am, C, C7, Cmaj7, F9.

item.title: Ukulele Cheats: Knockin' On Heaven's Door - Bob Dylan - Key of G
item.description: Play along video for the song Knockin' On Heaven's Door from the channel Ukulele Cheats. Artist: Bob Dylan. Chords: Am, C, D, G.

item.title: Miss Oli: Saranggola - Ben & Ben - Key of C
item.description: Play along video for the song Saranggola from the channel Miss Oli. Artist: Ben & Ben. Chords: Am, C, F, G.

item.title: Miss Oli: Misteryoso - Cup of Joe - Key of G
item.description: Play along video for the song Misteryoso from the channel Miss Oli. Artist: Cup of Joe. Chords: Am, Bm, C, Cm, D, Em, G.

item.title: Ukulele Time Yuji: Outlander - The Skye Boat Song - Key of Am
item.description: Play along video for the song Outlander - The Skye Boat Song from the channel Ukulele Time Yuji. Chords: Am, C, Dm, Dm7, F, G.

item.title: ucanlele (ukulele tutorial): Yellow Submarine - The Beatles
item.description: Play along video for the song Yellow Submarine from the channel ucanlele (ukulele tutorial). Artist: The Beatles. Chords: Am, C, D, Em, G.

item.title: ukulele plus: Some Beach - Blake Shelton - Key of C
item.description: Play along video for the song Some Beach from the channel ukulele plus. Artist: Blake Shelton. Chords: C, F, G.

item.title: Ukulele Time Yuji: Hey, Soul Sister - Train - Key of G
item.description: Play along video for the song Hey, Soul Sister from the channel Ukulele Time Yuji. Artist: Train. Chords: C, D, Em, G.

item.title: Ukulele Cheats: Creep - Radiohead - Key of G
item.description: Play along video for the song Creep from the channel Ukulele Cheats. Artist: Radiohead. Chords: B, C, Cm, G.

item.title: ukeplayalongs: Row, Row, Row Your Boat - Key of C
item.description: Play along video for the song Row, Row, Row Your Boat from the channel ukeplayalongs. Chords: C, C7, F, G.

item.title: UNI Modern Band: Nice To Meet You - Myles Smith - Key of Em
item.description: Play along video for the song Nice To Meet You from the channel UNI Modern Band. Artist: Myles Smith. Chords: C, D, Em, G.

item.title: ukulenny: Here Comes The Sun - The Beatles - Key of G
item.description: Play along video for the song Here Comes The Sun from the channel ukulenny. Artist: The Beatles. Chords: A7, A♯, C, D, F, G, G/D.

item.title: Ukulele Time Yuji: Por Una Cabeza - Carlos Gardel - Keys of C, Cm
item.description: Play along video for the song Por Una Cabeza from the channel Ukulele Time Yuji. Artist: Carlos Gardel. Chords: A7, Am7, A♭, B♭, C, C7, Cm, D7, Dm, E♭, F, Fm, G7.

item.title: Miss Oli: Dancing With Your Ghost - Sasha Alex Sloan - Key of C
item.description: Play along video for the song Dancing With Your Ghost from the channel Miss Oli. Artist: Sasha Alex Sloan. Chords: Am, C, Dm, F, G, G♯aug.

item.title: Miss Oli: Buksan Mo - Willie Revillame
item.description: Play along video for the song Buksan Mo from the channel Miss Oli. Artist: Willie Revillame. Chords: A, Bm, D, D7, E, Em, F♯m, G.

item.title: Ukulele Time Yuji: We're All Alone - Boz Scaggs - Key of F
item.description: Play along video for the song We're All Alone from the channel Ukulele Time Yuji. Artist: Boz Scaggs. Chords: A7, A7sus4, Am7, A♭dim7, B♭, B♭/C, C7, Dm, E♭, F, F7, Gm7.

item.title: ucanlele (ukulele tutorial): Four Strong Winds - Ian Tyson & Sylvia Tyson & Neil Young - Key of C
item.description: Play along video for the song Four Strong Winds from the channel ucanlele (ukulele tutorial). Artists: Ian Tyson & Sylvia Tyson & Neil Young. Chords: C, Dm, G.

item.title: ukulele plus: Cathy's Clown - The Everly Brothers
item.description: Play along video for the song Cathy's Clown from the channel ukulele plus. Artist: The Everly Brothers. Chords: C, D, Em, G.
